revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Io-jinja (Ibaraki, Osaka)]][[ja:井於神社]] {{Infobox religious building | name = Io Shrine | native_name = 井於神社 | image = Io 03.JPG | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Io Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.79357|135.554384}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo|ar|سوسانو|azb|سوسانو|bcl|Susanoo|be|Сусанаа|bg|Сусаноо|ca|Susanoo|cs|Susanoo|da|Susa-no-o|de|Susanoo|el|Σουσάνoο|en|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|eo|Susanoo|es|Susanoo|eu|Susanoo|fa|سوسانو (خدا)|fi|Susanoo|fr|Susanoo|hr|Susano|hu|Szuszanoo|hy|Սուսանո|id|Susanoo|it|Susanoo|ja|スサノオ|ka|სუსანოო-ნო-მიკოტო|ko|스사노오|la|Susano'o|lb|Susanoo|mni|ꯁꯨꯁꯅꯨ-ꯅꯣ-ꯃꯤꯀꯣꯇꯣ|nl|Susanoo|pl|Susanoo|pt|Susanoo|ro|Susanoo|ru|Сусаноо|simple|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|sl|Susanovo|sr|Сусаноо|su|Susanoo|sv|Susanoo|ta|சுசானவோ|th|ซูซาโนโอะ|tr|Susanoo|uk|Сусаноо|vi|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|zh_min_nan|Susanoo|zh|素戔嗚尊|qid=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} }} {{nihongo|'''Io Shrine'''|井於神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160338|ltq=Q135160338|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Q135009152|ltq=Q135009152|qid=Q135009152|1=Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver}} * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11498550|ltq=Q11498550|qid=Q11498550|1=List of Shikinaisha in Settsu Province}} ** Series ordinal: 27 ** P155: {{ill|Q11657591|ltq=Q11657591|qid=Q11657591|1=Ai Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Hashiriochino Shrine|lt=Hashiriochino Shrine|qid=Q135039214|1=Hashiriochino Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q502403|ltq=Q502403|qid=Q502403|1=Ibaraki, Osaka}} * {{ill|Q864163|ltq=Q864163|qid=Q864163|1=Settsu Province}} * {{ill|Shimashimo district|lt=Shimashimo district|ja|島下郡|zh|岛下郡|qid=Q10976940|1=Shimashimo district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.79357|135.554384}} == image (P18) == * Io 03.JPG == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo|ar|سوسانو|azb|سوسانو|bcl|Susanoo|be|Сусанаа|bg|Сусаноо|ca|Susanoo|cs|Susanoo|da|Susa-no-o|de|Susanoo|el|Σουσάνoο|en|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|eo|Susanoo|es|Susanoo|eu|Susanoo|fa|سوسانو (خدا)|fi|Susanoo|fr|Susanoo|hr|Susano|hu|Szuszanoo|hy|Սուսանո|id|Susanoo|it|Susanoo|ja|スサノオ|ka|სუსანოო-ნო-მიკოტო|ko|스사노오|la|Susano'o|lb|Susanoo|mni|ꯁꯨꯁꯅꯨ-ꯅꯣ-ꯃꯤꯀꯣꯇꯣ|nl|Susanoo|pl|Susanoo|pt|Susanoo|ro|Susanoo|ru|Сусаноо|simple|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|sl|Susanovo|sr|Сусаноо|su|Susanoo|sv|Susanoo|ta|சுசானவோ|th|ซูซาโนโอะ|tr|Susanoo|uk|Сусаноо|vi|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|zh_min_nan|Susanoo|zh|素戔嗚尊|qid=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} == OpenCorporates ID (P1320) == * jp/3120905000113 == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181047 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Gō-sha|lt=Gō-sha|ja|郷社|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * いおじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 3120905000113 == Commons category (P373) == * Io-jinja (Ibaraki, Osaka) == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '大阪府茨木市蔵垣内3丁目5-15', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Io-jinja (Ibaraki, Osaka)}} [[JA:井於神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11373608}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name=Io Shrine |Image=[[File:Io 03.JPG|270px]]
Worship hall |Location={{ill|lt=Osaka Prefecture|Q122723|qid=Q122723|1=Osaka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ibaraki City|Q502403|qid=Q502403|1=Ibaraki, Osaka}} 3-5-15 Kuragakuchi |Coordinates= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deities={{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|qid=Q272993|lt=Takeshi-hayasu-susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane|qid=Q2564508}}
{{ill|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|Q382005|qid=Q382005|1=Sugawara no Michizane}} |Shrine rank={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (minor)
Former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |Established=Unknown |Main hall style={{ill|lt=Nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |Annual festival={{ill|lt=October 19|Q2961|qid=Q2961|1=October 19}} |Map= {{Location map|Japan Osaka|label=Io Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Io Shrine''' (いおじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|lt=Ibaraki City|Q502403|qid=Q502403|1=Ibaraki, Osaka}}, {{ill|lt=Osaka Prefecture|Q122723|qid=Q122723|1=Osaka Prefecture}}. It is a Shikinaisha listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} of {{ill|lt=Settsu Province|Q864163|qid=Q864163|1=Settsu Province}}, {{ill|lt=Shimashimo District|Q10976940|qid=Q10976940|1=Shimashimo district}}. It is also called Sansho Myōjin. ===History=== It is said that the shrine was originally located in Unobe and was transferred to its present site during the Kyōtoku era ({{ill|lt=1452|Q6460|qid=Q6460|1=1452}}–{{ill|lt=1454|Q6476|qid=Q6476|1=1454}}). In the *Shoku Nihongi*, an entry appears for Inohe no Muraji in the 4th month of the 2nd year of Tenpyō-jingo ({{ill|lt=765|Q31216|qid=Q31216|1=765}}), and it is thought that he enshrined his {{ill|lt=clan deity|Q767655|qid=Q767655|1=Ujigami}}. * During the Eishō era ({{ill|lt=1504|Q6148|qid=Q6148|1=1504}}–{{ill|lt=1520|Q6284|qid=Q6284|1=1520}}), Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto was invited by Miyake Dewanokami. * In the 5th year of Meiji ({{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|qid=Q7753|1=1872}}), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. * In Meiji 40 ({{ill|lt=1907|Q2048|qid=Q2048|1=1907}}), it was designated a shrine receiving offerings of sacred food and ritual paper. * In September of Meiji 43 ({{ill|lt=1910|Q2075|qid=Q2075|1=1910}}), Hachiman Shrine in front of Unobe Hall, Kōtaijingū to the northeast, Tsuruno Nishikawa Kōtaijingū, and the minor shrine Suijinsha were jointly enshrined. ===Enshrined deities=== Currently, the following three deities are enshrined: * {{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|qid=Q272993|lt=Takeshi-hayasu-susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane|qid=Q2564508}} * {{ill|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|Q382005|qid=Q382005|1=Sugawara no Michizane}} ===Subsidiary shrines=== * Hachiman Shrine: Suga Yahiro-no-Mikoto, Hachiman Ōkami, Amaterasu Ōmikami, Toyouke Ōkami * Itsukushima Shrine: Ichikishimahime-no-Mikoto * Suijin Shrine: Hanimisuhiko Ōkami, Mitsuhanome Ōkami * Kōtaijingū: Amaterasu Ōmikami, Toyouke Ōkami * Ōkuni Shrine: Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto, Ōkuninushi-no-Mikoto ===References=== * Ibaraki City Board of Education, *Waga Machi Ibaraki: Shrines and Temples* (1989) {{National Bibliography Number|89049621}} * Masao Inoue, *Complete Gazetteer of Osaka Prefecture* (1922) {{National Bibliography Number|73012615}} * Edited by Osaka Prefecture Shinto Youth Association, *Osaka Prefecture Shrine Directory* (1971) {{NCID|BA39399841}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Io-jinja (Ibaraki, Osaka) }} * [https://io-jinja.org/ Io Shrine Official Website] {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Io Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Io Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Settsu Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ibaraki, Osaka]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Settsu Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Osaka Prefecture]]
